text:
The diff is a single HTML comment added to README.md with the text `overlay infra test`. This has no connection to any roadmap target — it advances no mathematical content, no prerequisite infrastructure, and no documentation for any of the four roadmap areas (Jacobian Challenge, PDE, ReductiveGroups, UniversalCovers). The comment text itself suggests it's a test of deployment/overlay infrastructure, not a substantive contribution.

TAUCETI-VERDICT-676946162f98593bb088225d

```json
      "line": 58,
      "issue": "The added comment serves no roadmap purpose — it is not code, documentation, or prerequisite infrastructure for any target in JacobianChallenge, PDE, ReductiveGroups, or UniversalCovers.",
      "fix": "Close this PR. If this is genuinely testing overlay infrastructure, route it through a dedicated infra channel rather than a content PR.",
      "evidence": "Diff adds only `<!-- overlay infra test -->`. Roadmap directories (./roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/JacobianChallenge, PDE, ReductiveGroups, UniversalCovers) contain no node or heading that this change could plausibly advance."
    }
  ]
}
```
